flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cornell University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.0k → $69.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cornell University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.0k → $69.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cornell University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Cornell University are 69% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($104.0k vs $61.5k).
